decision: The platform authenticates as an Entra ID app registration, not a managed identity
why: A managed identity requires an Azure resource as its host, but the platform has no subscription of its own — an app registration exists in Entra ID independently of any Azure infrastructure.

links.note: The platform identity holds Directory.ReadWrite.All and Application.ReadWrite.All, used to perform appRoleAssignedTo during landing zone provisioning.

violations: Platform app registration shared with non-platform workloads.
